name: Pi 24x40 RV Garage Shed Plan - Modern Barn Style RV Storage & Workshop
open_features: A spacious footprint designed to comfortably accommodate RVs, motorhomes, campers, boats, and multiple vehicles with room for shelving, tools, or workspace.
Wide overhead garage door provides easy entry and maneuverability for larger vehicles and trailers.
The tall gable roof adds vertical clearance, excellent water drainage, and the timeless look of a modern barn-style garage.
Horizontal siding paired with a brick wainscot base creates a balanced modern-rustic appearance while adding durability and architectural character.
description_summary: Upgrade your property with the Pi RV Garage Shed - a spacious 24x40 storage and workshop structure designed for durability, efficiency, and classic barn-inspired style. Featuring a tall gable roof, warm horizontal siding, and a sturdy brick wainscot base, Pi combines practical vehicle storage with clean architectural lines that complement rural homes, farms, and modern backyard landscapes. The generous 24x40 footprint provides ample interior space to house RVs, campers, trailers, boats, truck...
